steps.detailedTagText: Introduce yourself and identify the patient.
Turn on the water and adjust the flow so that the water is warm.
Wet hands thoroughly, keeping hands and forearms lower than elbows. Avoid splashing water on uniform.
steps.clinicalNote: Avoid splashing on uniform; keep forearms and wrists lower than elbows.

steps.detailedTagText: Apply a palm-sized amount of hand soap.
Perform hand hygiene using plenty of lather and friction for at least 20 seconds.
subSteps: Rub back of right and left hand (fingers interlaced)
Rub palm to palm with fingers interlaced
Perform rotational rubbing of left and right thumbs
Rub fingertips against palm of opposite hand
Repeat sequence at least two times
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Lather all surfaces ≥20 sec; repeat full sequence ≥2×

steps.detailedTagText: Keep fingertips pointing downward throughout the entire handwashing process.
steps.clinicalNote: Credentia absorbs this into Steps 5 & 7 — GWC scores it as a standalone observable action. Students must demonstrate it explicitly.
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Fingertips down throughout entire wash

subSteps: Rub fingertips against palm of opposite hand

steps.detailedTagText: Rinse hands with water, keeping fingertips pointing down so water runs off fingertips. Do not shake water from your hands.
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Rinse fingertips-down; do not shake water from hands

steps.detailedTagText: Dry hands thoroughly from fingers to wrists with a paper towel or air dryer. Dispose of the paper towel(s).
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Dry fingertip-to-wrist; use paper towel or air dryer

steps.detailedTagText: Use a new paper towel to turn off the water. Dispose of the paper towel.
steps.clinicalNote: GWC: paper towel only. Credentia also allows knee/foot control — GWC governs on exam.
steps.examScorecard: Technique: Turn off faucet with clean paper towel; dispose immediately

steps.stepText: Never lean on or touch sink
steps.detailedTagText: Do not lean against the sink or touch the inside of the sink during the handwashing process.
steps.examScorecard: Safety: No contact with sink at any time (lean or touch)
